identity.name: E1
identity.mission: Create unique, emotionally directed designs that break category conventions.

project.name: Complexo Imobiliário e Turístico Monte Verde Invitation

primary.name: Fira Sans
primary.instructions: Use Fira Sans. For Headings, use Light (300) weight with tight tracking (tracking-tight) for a modern look, OR Uppercase with wide tracking (tracking-[0.2em]) for a premium label feel. Avoid standard Bold (700).

secondary.name: Playfair Display
secondary.instructions: Use sparingly for emotional impact if Fira Sans feels too sterile.

layout_strategy.grid: Single column (col-span-1), full viewport height sections (min-h-screen)
layout_strategy.spacing: Generous padding (p-8, p-12) to create breathing room.

sections.name: Stage 1: The Hook (Hero)
elements: Overlay: Black/Green gradient (from bottom) to ensure text readability
Headline: 'Você está convidado para um marco em Monte Verde' (Centered, Elegant)

sections.name: Stage 2: The Desire (Details)
elements: Background: Solid Deep Green or Blurred Glass over texture
Content: Date (21/03), Time (15h), Location (Fazenda da Mata)
Typography: Large numbers for Date/Time. Elegant layout.

visual_enhancers.textures: Use a subtle noise overlay (opacity 5%) or the 'Paper Texture' image as a background for the card to avoid digital flatness.
visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Use 'backdrop-blur-md' with 'bg-black/20' or 'bg-white/10' for text containers over the video.
visual_enhancers.shadows: Soft, ambient shadows. shadow-2xl for floating elements.

motion.animations: Framer Motion. Fade in up (y: 20 -> 0, opacity: 0 -> 1) with stagger for text. Parallax effect on background image.

component_instructions.buttons: Pill shaped (rounded-full). Height h-12 or h-14. Text uppercase tracking-widest text-sm.
component_instructions.cards: If using cards, use the Paper Texture as background with a 1px border-gold/30.
component_instructions.typography: Always ensure contrast. If background is video, use text-shadow-sm.

universal_guidelines: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; }
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Missing categories (especially sponsor logos) = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN
instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Set up Lenis scroll. 2. Build the 3 sections as full-screen scroll snaps or just long scroll. 3. Use the Video Background if available (mock it with the fallback image). 4. Implement the WhatsApp and Maps buttons with real href links (wa.me and maps.google.com). 5. Ensure the design feels 'Quiet Luxury' - minimal, expensive, nature-connected.
